'''√p-sh-p''' ('''pashapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:deblock|deblock]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-sh-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:deblock|deblock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √p-sh-p
|-
! Lemma
| pashapa
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || pashapithi || pashapiji || pashapishi || pashapi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || pashaputhuth || pashapujuj || pashapushush || pashap
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || pashaputhu || pashapuju || pashapushu || pashapu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || pashapufuth || pashapufuj || pashapufush || pashapuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || pashapethe || pashapeje || pashapeshe || pashape
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || pashapothoth || pashapojoj || pashaposhosh || pashap
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || pashapotho || pashapojo || pashaposho || pashapo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || pashapofoth || pashapofoj || pashapofosh || pashapof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || pashapïf || pashapïf || pashapïf || pashapïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || pashapïfïf || pashapïfïf || pashapïfïf || pashapïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || pashapïf || pashapïf || pashapïf || pashapïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || pashapïf || pashapïf || pashapïf || pashapïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || pashapæthæ || pashapæjæ || pashapæshæ || pashapæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || pashapathath || pashapajaj || pashapashash || pashap
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || pashapatha || pashapaja || pashapasha || pashapa
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || pashapafath || pashapafaj || pashapafash || pashapaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || pashapasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gopashapasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokipashapasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || pashapnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gopashapnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokipashapnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || pashapshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gopashapnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokipashapshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || pashaproasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gopashapnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokipashaproasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || pashapmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gopashapnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokipashapmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || pashapsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gopashapnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokipashapsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || pashapngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gopashapnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokipashapngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || pashapyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gopashapnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokipashapyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || pashapyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gopashapnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokipashapyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || pashapnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gopashapnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokipashapnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || pashapnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gopashapnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokipashapnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || pashapnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gopashapnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokipashapnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || pashapshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gopashapnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokipashapshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || pashapshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gopashapnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokipashapshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || pashapshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gopashapnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokipashapshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || pashapronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gopashapnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokipashapronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || pashaproshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gopashapnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokipashaproshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || pashapromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gopashapnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokipashapromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || pashapmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gopashapnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokipashapmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || pashapmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gopashapnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokipashapmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || pashapmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gopashapnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokipashapmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || pashap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || pæshæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hopashap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hopæshæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohopashap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohopæshæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüpashap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüpæshæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nünüpashap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nünüpæshæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïpashap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïpæshæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïpashap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïpæshæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lupashap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || lupæshæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lulupashap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lulupæshæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lipashap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lipæshæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilipashap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilipæshæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kopashap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kopæshæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokopashap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokopæshæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kepashap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kepæshæp
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekepashap
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekepæshæp
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
